apple.en: A round fruit with red or green skin

ant.en: A small insect that lives in highly organized groups

art.en: The expression of human creative skill and imagination

animal.en: A living organism that feeds on organic matter

ball.en: A solid or hollow spherical or egg-shaped object

ear.en: The organ of hearing and balance in humans

eye.en: Each of a pair of globular organs in the head

flower.en: The seed-bearing part of a plant

island.en: A piece of land surrounded by water

iron.en: A strong, hard magnetic silvery-gray metal

idea.en: A thought or suggestion as to a possible course of action

ink.en: A colored fluid used for writing

juice.en: The liquid obtained from or present in fruit

jump.en: Push oneself off a surface and into the air

knee.en: The joint between the thigh and the lower leg

lake.en: A large body of water surrounded by land

leaf.en: A flattened structure of a higher plant

moon.en: The natural satellite of the earth

nest.en: A structure or place made or chosen by a bird

night.en: The period of darkness in each twenty-four hours

nose.en: The part projecting above the mouth

name.en: A word or set of words by which a person is known

ocean.en: A very large expanse of sea

oil.en: A viscous liquid derived from petroleum

onion.en: An edible bulb with a pungent taste

pen.en: An instrument for writing or drawing with ink

plant.en: A living organism of the kind exemplified by trees

power.en: The ability to do something or act in a particular way

queen.en: The female ruler of an independent state

question.en: A sentence worded or expressed so as to elicit information

quick.en: Moving fast or doing something in a short time

quiz.en: A test of knowledge, especially a brief informal test

river.en: A large natural stream of water flowing in a channel

red.en: Of a color at the end of the spectrum next to orange

sun.en: The star around which the earth orbits

star.en: A fixed luminous point in the night sky

sea.en: The expanse of salt water that covers most of the earth

tiger.en: A very large solitary cat with a yellow-orange coat

train.en: A series of connected railway carriages or wagons

time.en: The indefinite continued progress of existence

tea.en: A hot drink made by infusing the dried crushed leaves

umbrella.en: A device consisting of a circular canopy of cloth on a folding metal frame

uncle.en: The brother of one's father or mother

unit.en: An individual thing or person regarded as single and complete

uniform.en: The distinctive clothing worn by members of the same organization

use.en: Take, hold, or deploy as a means of accomplishing something

voice.en: The sound produced in a person's larynx

village.en: A group of houses and associated buildings

valley.en: A low area of land between hills or mountains

wood.en: The hard fibrous material that forms the main substance of the trunk

wind.en: The perceptible natural movement of the air

wolf.en: A wild carnivorous mammal of the dog family

wall.en: A continuous vertical brick or stone structure

xylophone.en: A musical instrument played by striking a row of wooden bars

xray.en: An electromagnetic wave of high energy and very short wavelength

yacht.en: A medium-sized sailboat equipped for cruising or racing

yellow.en: Of the color between green and orange in the spectrum

yard.en: A piece of uncultivated ground adjoining a building

year.en: The time taken by the earth to make one revolution around the sun

yoga.en: A Hindu spiritual and ascetic discipline

zebra.en: An African wild horse with black-and-white stripes

zoo.en: An establishment which maintains a collection of wild animals

zone.en: An area or stretch of land having a particular characteristic

zip.en: A device consisting of two flexible strips of metal or plastic

earth.en: The planet on which we live

east.en: The direction toward the point of the horizon where the sun rises

edge.en: The outside limit of an object, area, or surface

effect.en: A change which is a result or consequence of an action or other cause

energy.en: The strength and vitality required for sustained activity

engine.en: A machine with moving parts that converts power into motion

event.en: A thing that happens, especially one of importance

tail.en: The hindmost part of an animal

talk.en: Speak in order to give information or express ideas

tank.en: A large receptacle or storage chamber

task.en: A piece of work to be done or undertaken

taste.en: The sensation of flavor perceived in the mouth

tax.en: A compulsory contribution to state revenue

tear.en: A drop of clear salty liquid secreted from glands in a person's eye

teen.en: A person aged between 13 and 19 years

term.en: A word or phrase used to describe a thing

test.en: A procedure intended to establish the quality or performance

text.en: A book or other written or printed work

theme.en: The subject of a talk, a piece of writing

thing.en: An object that one need not, cannot, or does not wish to give a specific name to

title.en: The name of a book, composition, or other artistic work

tone.en: A musical or vocal sound with reference to its pitch, quality, and strength

tooth.en: Each of a set of hard, bony enamel-coated structures in the jaws of most vertebrates

topic.en: A matter dealt with in a text, discourse, or conversation

total.en: Comprising the whole number or amount

tour.en: A journey for pleasure in which several different places are visited

town.en: An urban area that has a name, defined boundaries, and local government

track.en: A rough path or minor road

trade.en: The action of buying and selling goods and services

trip.en: A journey or excursion, especially for pleasure

trust.en: Firm belief in the reliability, truth, ability, or strength of someone or something

truth.en: The quality or state of being true

tube.en: A long, hollow cylinder of metal, plastic, glass

tune.en: A melody, especially one that characterizes a certain piece of music

turn.en: An act of moving something in a circular direction around an axis or point

type.en: A category of people or things having common characteristics

nation.en: A large body of people united by common descent, history, culture

nature.en: The phenomena of the physical world collectively

neck.en: The part of a person's or animal's body connecting the head to the rest of the body

need.en: Circumstances in which something is necessary

nerve.en: A whitish fiber or bundle of fibers that transmits impulses

noise.en: A sound, especially one that is loud or unpleasant

north.en: The direction in which a compass needle normally points

note.en: A brief record of facts, topics, or thoughts

nurse.en: A person trained to care for the sick or infirm

data.en: Facts and statistics collected together for reference or analysis

date.en: The day of the month or year as specified by a number

deal.en: An agreement entered into by two or more parties

death.en: The action or fact of dying or being killed

diet.en: The kinds of food that a person, animal, or community habitually eats

dinner.en: The main meal of the day

dirt.en: A substance, such as mud or dust, that soils someone or something

draw.en: Produce a picture or diagram by making lines and marks

drug.en: A medicine or other substance which has a physiological effect

dust.en: Fine, dry powder consisting of tiny particles

race.en: A competition between runners, horses, vehicles

radio.en: The transmission and reception of electromagnetic waves

ratio.en: The quantitative relation between two amounts

read.en: Look at and comprehend the meaning of written or printed matter

reality.en: The world or the state of things as they actually exist

reason.en: A cause, explanation, or justification for an action or event

record.en: A thing constituting a piece of evidence about the past

rent.en: A tenant's regular payment to a landlord

reply.en: Say something in response to something someone has said

report.en: Give a spoken or written account of something

rest.en: Cease work or movement in order to relax

result.en: A consequence, effect, or outcome of something

rice.en: A swamp grass which is widely cultivated as a source of food

ride.en: Sit on and control the movement of

ring.en: A small circular band, typically of precious metal

risk.en: A situation involving exposure to danger

road.en: A wide way leading from one place to another

rock.en: The solid mineral material forming part of the surface of the earth

role.en: An actor's part in a play, movie, etc.

roof.en: The structure forming the upper covering of a building

root.en: The part of a plant which attaches it to the ground

rose.en: A prickly bush or shrub that typically bears red, pink, yellow, or white fragrant flowers

rule.en: One of a set of explicit or understood regulations or principles

accident.en: An unfortunate incident that happens unexpectedly

action.en: The fact or process of doing something

actor.en: A person whose profession is acting on the stage, in movies, or on television

advice.en: Guidance or recommendations concerning prudent future action

airport.en: A complex of runways and buildings for the takeoff, landing, and maintenance of civil aircraft

album.en: A blank book for the insertion of photographs, stamps, or pictures

alien.en: Belonging to a foreign country or nation

angel.en: A spiritual being believed to act as an attendant, agent, or messenger of God

anger.en: A strong feeling of annoyance, displeasure, or hostility

angle.en: The space (usually measured in degrees) between two intersecting lines or surfaces

answer.en: A thing said, written, or done to deal with or as a reaction to a question

area.en: A region or part of a town, a country, or the world

army.en: An organized military force equipped for fighting on land

author.en: A writer of a book, article, or report

award.en: A prize or other mark of recognition given in honor of an achievement

baby.en: A very young child, especially one newly or recently born

back.en: The rear surface of the human body from the shoulders to the hips

balance.en: An even distribution of weight enabling someone or something to remain upright and steady

band.en: A small group of musicians and vocalists who play pop, jazz, or rock music

bank.en: A financial establishment that invests money deposited by customers

base.en: The lowest part or edge of something, especially the part on which it rests

basket.en: A container used to hold or carry things

bath.en: A large container for water, used for immersing and washing the body

battle.en: A sustained fight between large, organized armed forces

beach.en: A pebbly or sandy shore, especially by the ocean between high- and low-water marks

beauty.en: A combination of qualities that pleases the intellect or moral sense

bed.en: A piece of furniture for sleep or rest

beer.en: An alcoholic drink made from yeast-fermented malt flavored with hops

bell.en: A hollow object, typically made of metal and having the shape of a deep inverted cup

belt.en: A strip of leather or other material worn around the waist

blood.en: The red liquid that circulates in the arteries and veins of humans and other vertebrate animals

board.en: A long, thin, flat piece of wood or other hard material

body.en: The physical structure of a person or an animal

bomb.en: A container filled with explosive, incendiary material

bone.en: Any of the pieces of hard, whitish tissue making up the skeleton in humans and other vertebrates

book.en: A written or printed work consisting of pages glued or sewn together along one side and bound in covers

boss.en: A person in charge of a worker or organization

bottle.en: A glass or plastic container with a narrow neck

bowl.en: A round, deep dish or basin used for food or liquid

brain.en: An organ of soft nervous tissue contained in the skull of vertebrates

bread.en: Food made of flour, water, and yeast or another leavening agent

bridge.en: A structure carrying a road, path, railroad, or canal across a river, ravine, or other obstacle

brush.en: An implement with a handle, consisting of bristles, hair, or wire

build.en: Construct by putting parts or material together over a period of time

bus.en: A large motor vehicle carrying passengers by road

business.en: A person's regular occupation, profession, or trade

button.en: A small disk or knob sewn on to a garment

capital.en: The most important city or town of a country or region

card.en: A piece of thick, stiff paper or thin pasteboard

care.en: The provision of what is necessary for the health, welfare, maintenance, and protection of someone or something

case.en: An instance of a particular situation

castle.en: A large building or group of buildings fortified against attack with thick walls, battlements, towers

cause.en: A person or thing that gives rise to an action, phenomenon, or condition

cell.en: The smallest structural and functional unit of an organism

center.en: The middle point of a circle or sphere, equidistant from every point on the circumference or surface

chain.en: A series of linked metal rings used for fastening or securing something

chair.en: A separate seat for one person, typically with a back and four legs

character.en: The mental and moral qualities distinctive to an individual

charge.en: Store electrical energy in (a battery or battery-operated device)

chart.en: A sheet of information in the form of a table, graph, or diagram

check.en: Examine (something) in order to determine its accuracy, quality, or condition

child.en: A young human being below the age of puberty or below the legal age of majority

choice.en: An act of selecting or making a decision when faced with two or more possibilities

church.en: A building used for public Christian worship

circle.en: A round plane figure whose boundary consists of points equidistant from a fixed point

claim.en: State or assert that something is the case

class.en: A set or category of things having some property or attribute in common

clean.en: Free from dirt, marks, or stains

clear.en: Easy to perceive, understand, or interpret

clock.en: A mechanical or electrical device for measuring time, indicating hours, minutes, and sometimes seconds

close.en: Move or cause to move so as to cover an opening

cloud.en: A visible mass of condensed water vapor floating in the atmosphere

club.en: An association or organization dedicated to a particular interest or activity

coach.en: A person who trains and directs an athlete or a sports team

coal.en: A combustible black or dark brown rock consisting mainly of carbonized plant matter

coast.en: The part of the land near the sea; the edge of the land

coat.en: An outer garment worn outdoors, having sleeves and typically extending below the hips

code.en: A system of words, letters, figures, or other symbols substituted for other words

coffee.en: A hot drink made from the roasted and ground seeds of a tropical shrub

cold.en: Of or at a low or relatively low temperature

color.en: The property possessed by an object of producing different sensations on the eye as a result of the way the object reflects or emits light

control.en: The power to influence or direct people's behavior or the course of events

cook.en: Prepare (food, a dish, or a meal) by combining and heating the ingredients in various ways

cool.en: Of or at a fairly low temperature

copy.en: A thing made to be similar or identical to another

corn.en: A North American cereal plant that yields large grains, or kernels, set in rows on a cob

corner.en: A place or angle where two or more sides or edges meet

cost.en: Require the payment of (a specified sum of money) before it can be acquired or done

cotton.en: A soft white fibrous substance that surrounds the seeds of a tropical and subtropical plant

cough.en: Expel air from the lungs with a sudden sharp sound

country.en: A nation with its own government, occupying a particular territory

course.en: The route or direction followed by a ship, aircraft, road, or river

cover.en: Put something such as a cloth or lid on top of or in front of (something)

crash.en: Collide violently with an obstacle or another vehicle

cream.en: The thick white or pale yellow fatty liquid which rises to the top when milk is left to stand

crime.en: An action or omission that constitutes an offense that may be prosecuted by the state and is punishable by law

cross.en: A mark, object, or figure formed by two short intersecting lines or pieces

crowd.en: A large number of people gathered together in a disorganized or unruly way

crown.en: A circular ornamental headdress worn by a monarch as a symbol of authority

cry.en: Shed tears, typically as an expression of distress, pain, or sorrow

culture.en: The arts and other manifestations of human intellectual achievement regarded collectively

cure.en: Relieve (a person or animal) of the symptoms of a disease or condition

curve.en: A line or outline which gradually deviates from being straight for some or all of its length

damage.en: Physical harm caused to something in such a way as to impair its value, usefulness, or normal function

danger.en: The possibility of suffering harm or injury

degree.en: The amount, level, or extent to which something happens or is present

design.en: A plan or drawing produced to show the look and function or workings of a building

detail.en: An individual feature, fact, or item

device.en: A thing made or adapted for a particular purpose

diamond.en: A precious stone consisting of a clear and typically colorless crystalline form of pure carbon

disease.en: A disorder of structure or function in a human, animal, or plant

distance.en: An amount of space between two things or people

doctor.en: A qualified practitioner of medicine; a physician

dream.en: A series of thoughts, images, and sensations occurring in a person's mind during sleep

dress.en: A one-piece garment for a woman or girl that covers the body and extends down over the legs

drink.en: Take a liquid into the mouth and swallow

expert.en: A person who has a comprehensive and authoritative knowledge of or skill in a particular area

fact.en: A thing that is indisputably the case

factor.en: A circumstance, fact, or influence that contributes to a result or outcome

factory.en: A building or group of buildings where goods are manufactured or assembled chiefly by machine

family.en: A group of one or more parents and their children living together as a unit

farm.en: An area of land and its buildings used for growing crops and rearing animals

farmer.en: A person who owns or manages a farm

father.en: A man in relation to his natural child or children

fear.en: An unpleasant emotion caused by the belief that someone or something is dangerous

field.en: An area of open land, especially one planted with crops or pasture

fight.en: Take part in a violent struggle involving the exchange of physical blows or the use of weapons

figure.en: A number, especially one which forms part of official statistics

film.en: A story or event recorded by a camera as a set of moving images

finger.en: Each of the four slender jointed parts attached to either hand

floor.en: The lower surface of a room, on which one may walk

focus.en: The center of interest or activity

food.en: Any nutritious substance that people or animals eat or drink

foot.en: The lower extremity of the leg below the ankle

force.en: Strength or energy as an attribute of physical action or movement

form.en: The visible shape or configuration of something

friend.en: A person whom one knows and with whom one has a bond of mutual affection

front.en: The side or part of an object that presents itself to view

fruit.en: The sweet and fleshy product of a tree or other plant that contains seed and can be eaten

future.en: The time or a period of time following the moment of speaking or writing

garden.en: A piece of ground, often near a house, used for growing flowers, fruit, or vegetables

gas.en: A substance or matter in a state in which it will expand freely to fill the whole of a container

gate.en: A hinged barrier used to close an opening in a wall, fence, or hedge

gift.en: A thing given willingly to someone without payment

glass.en: A hard, brittle substance, typically transparent or translucent

goal.en: The object of a person's ambition or effort; an aim or desired result

group.en: A number of people or things that are located close together or are considered or classed together

guest.en: A person who is invited to visit the home of or take part in a function organized by another

guide.en: A person who advises or shows the way to others

hair.en: Any of the fine threadlike strands growing from the skin of humans, mammals, and some other animals

half.en: Either of two equal or corresponding parts into which something is or can be divided

hall.en: An area in a building onto which rooms open; a corridor

head.en: The upper part of the human body, or the front or upper part of the body of an animal

health.en: The state of being free from illness or injury

heat.en: The quality of being hot; high temperature

history.en: The study of past events, particularly in human affairs

hole.en: A hollow place in a solid body or surface

home.en: The place where one lives permanently, especially as a member of a family or household

hope.en: A feeling of expectation and desire for a certain thing to happen

hospital.en: An institution providing medical and surgical treatment and nursing care for sick or injured people

hotel.en: An establishment providing accommodations, meals, and other services for travelers and tourists

hour.en: A period of time equal to a twenty-fourth part of a day and night and divided into 60 minutes

image.en: A representation of the external form of a person or thing in art

impact.en: The action of one object coming forcibly into contact with another

income.en: Money received, especially on a regular basis, for work or through investments

industry.en: Economic activity concerned with the processing of raw materials and manufacture of goods

information.en: Facts provided or learned about something or someone

insect.en: A small arthropod animal that has six legs and generally one or two pairs of wings

interest.en: The state of wanting to know or learn about something or someone

internet.en: A global computer network providing a variety of information and communication facilities

issue.en: An important topic or problem for debate or discussion
